title: ICE are heavily armed killers. They’re also huge losers
summary: The Trump DHS faces scrutiny over federal agents' use of deadly force in immigration enforcement and ICE's monitoring of online criticism, raising questions about agency accountability.
content:
Federal agents patrol the halls of immigration court at the Jacob K. Javits Federal Building in December 2025. | Photo by Michael Nigro/Pacific Press/LightRocket via Getty Images	

Donald Trump's Homeland Security regime has been at the center of two critical stories in the past two weeks. In the first, federal agents shot and killed a man and quickly got to work justifying the use of force under the flimsiest of pretenses. In the other, it made house calls to people who said mean things to them online.
Since taking office last year, the Trump administration has been telling us that fighting the good fight of white supremacy will make you look cool and noble. The DHS under former Secretary Kristi Noem spent $220 million to help her cosplay as a cowboy railing against immigrants and call up ICE recruits as if we're fig …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ICE是武装的杀手。他们也是失败者
zh.summary: Trump政府DHS因联邦特工在移民执法中使用致命武力以及ICE监控网络批评而受到审查，引发了关于机构问责的问题。

title: A Jupiter-size planet that escaped its star's death
summary: Astronomers discovered a Jupiter-sized exoplanet that survived its parent star's red giant phase, though the mechanism for its escape remains unexplained.
content: It's unclear how the planet avoided its star's bloated red giant stage.

zh.title: 逃脱恒星死亡的木星大小行星
zh.summary: 天文学家发现了一颗在其母恒星红巨星阶段幸存下来的木星大小系外行星，但其逃脱机制仍然不明确。

title: A tasty RPG that will make you very hungry
summary: Dosa Divas is a compact RPG delivering an epic narrative in under 10 hours, balancing sweeping storytelling with personal character drama through distinctive visual design.
content:
Roleplaying games are often defined by excess. Storylines that span dozens of hours, side quests so big they could be their own game, massive worlds that require complex maps to explore, and casts so big you start forgetting character names. That's part of what makes these games feel like epic adventures, but it can also make them intimidating, particularly if you have limited spare time. Dosa Divas, on the other hand, manages to capture much of that same feeling in a package that spans less than 10 hours. And it does it with a bold sense of style and a story that seamlessly flits between big themes and personal drama. There's just one big d …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一款美味的RPG游戏会让你很饿
zh.summary: Dosa Divas是一款紧凑的RPG游戏，在10小时内呈现宏大的叙事，通过独特的视觉设计平衡恢宏的故事讲述与个人角色戏剧。

title: The perfect kit for all your tiny repairs
summary: The Verge's Installer column recommends practical repair tools and curated entertainment picks, including commentary on current media and tech culture trends.
content:
Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 135, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, crank the AC, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) 
This week, I've been reading about cold plunges and Colson Whitehead and the food truck mafia, finally getting to the theater to see Obsession, watching The Agency because it's apparently everyone's favorite underrated show, nodding sadly to Adam Conover's video about the death of sitcoms, making a lot of noises during the Dune: Part Three trailer, testing Atlas as a visual journal, giggling endlessly at the new InfoWars, and s …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 所有微小修缮的完美工具包
zh.summary: The Verge的Installer专栏推荐了实用的修缮工具和精心挑选的娱乐内容,包括对当前媒体和科技文化趋势的评论。

title: Overhaul of public lands grazing regulations seeks to cut public involvement
summary: The Bureau of Land Management is revising its public lands grazing regulations for the first time since 1995, with potential reductions to public participation in rule-making.
content: For the first time since 1995, the Bureau of Land Management is rewriting its grazing regulations.

zh.title: 公共土地放牧规定改革力求减少公众参与
zh.summary: 土地管理局自1995年以来首次修订公共土地放牧规定,可能会减少公众在规则制定过程中的参与机会。

title: Are you filthy enough for a $700 portable shower?
summary: Portable showers like the $700 Hottap Go address the hygiene challenges of outdoor enthusiasts camping, overlanding, and vanlifing. With a 12-liter integrated tank and no need for external containers, it offers a feasible luxury alternative for remote locations.
content:
A luxurious hot shower anywhere you go.	

Hot showers, like electricity, are a luxury that's easy to take for granted. That all changes after a few nights camping at a music festival, a week toiling at a backcountry job site, or overlanding all summer in the great unknown. An itchy scalp and the vague smell of warm clams suddenly make the idea of spending hundreds on a portable shower seem less absurd. 
I've been testing the Hottap Go from Australia-based Joolca while vanlifing to shower after surfing and to wash up after cooking. It features a 12L integrated water tank which is an improvement on other portable showers that require an external container and long, cumbersome hose th …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 价值700美元的便携式淋浴真的值得吗？
zh.summary: 便携式淋浴如700美元的Hottap Go解决了露营、越野旅行和房车旅行爱好者的卫生问题。配备12升集成水箱，无需外部容器，为偏远地区提供了切实可行的奢侈替代方案。

title: US cybersecurity agency CISA had to build its incident playbook during the incident, agency reveals
summary: CISA employee at a contractor exposed passwords in a public GitHub repository, forcing the agency to develop its incident response playbook reactively during the breach. This reveals critical gaps in cybersecurity preparedness even at the nation's top cybersecurity agency.
content: Independent cybersecurity journalist Brian Krebs reported in May that a security researcher with cyber firm GitGuardian alerted him to reams of exposed passwords stored in a publicly accessible GitHub repository, which an employee of a CISA contractor had uploaded.

zh.title: 美国网络安全机构CISA在事件期间被迫构建事件应对手册，该机构披露
zh.summary: CISA承包商员工在公共GitHub仓库中泄露密码，迫使该机构在违规期间被动地制定事件应对手册。这暴露了即使是美国顶级网络安全机构在网络安全防范方面的关键缺陷。

title: Phia accused of ‘cookie stuffing,’ taking affiliate credit on purchases it didn’t earn
summary: Phia, a shopping startup founded by Bill Gates' daughter Phoebe, faces allegations of "cookie stuffing"—deceptively claiming credit for sales it didn't facilitate. The practice allowed the company to fraudulently receive affiliate commissions, according to a Bloomberg investigation.
content: Phia, the shopping startup founded by Bill Gates’ daughter, Phoebe, and her friend Sophia Kianni is under fire for a practice known as “cookie stuffing,” which helped the product receive commissions and credit for sales it did not actually generate, per a Bloomberg investigation.

zh.title: Phia被指控"Cookie填充"欺诈，对未促成的购买申报联盟链接信用
zh.summary: 由比尔·盖茨女儿菲比创立的购物初创公司Phia面临"Cookie填充"指控——欺骗性地宣称对其未协助的销售有贡献。根据彭博社的调查，这种做法使该公司能够欺诈性地获得联盟佣金。

title: No, Flock isn’t threatening people for debating surveillance
summary: After a cease and desist letter surfaced, Flock Safety faced backlash over surveillance practices, though the letter wasn't actually threatening people for discussing its work. The incident reflects broader concerns about Flock's partnerships with law enforcement.
content:
On Thursday, the Instagram account for a lecture series in Newport Beach, CA posted a photo of what appeared to be a cease and desist letter from the surveillance technology company Flock Safety. Flock has received significant backlash over its technology and work with law enforcement agencies, and this letter kicked off yet another wave of criticism against the company for allegedly trying to shut down discussions of its work.
"WE WILL NOT BE SILENCED," the group, The Saturday Salon, wrote in the Instagram post, which has more than 3,000 likes. A separate post about the letter on Bluesky has more than 360 reposts. The text of the letter de …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 不，Flock并未因讨论监控而威胁人们
zh.summary: 在一份终止函曝光后，Flock Safety因其监控做法面临强烈反对，尽管该函实际上并未因人们讨论其工作而威胁他们。这一事件反映了对Flock与执法部门合作的更广泛担忧。
